productDisplayName: ADIDAS Unisex CR FB Black Backpacks
description: Designed for the young lot of college goers and those who never compromise on style and comfort, this adidas CR FB backpack is stylish to the hilt and has a lot of space to carry your essentials.Height: 17 inchesWidth: 12 inchesDepth: 7Capacity: 3kgMade of 100% polyester with a 100% polyester shell for durability and easy cleaning Branded zippers and sliders for easy use and longer life of the bagOne main copiously spaced zippered compartment with a separatorOne front compartment with one diagonally zippered pouch on the top to enhance storage space Twill tape haul loop for handling ease Wide, adjustable padded handles for carrying ease and to protect the shoulders and back from injuriesErgonomically padded back for carrying comfort Brand name printed on front compartment, with adidas patented 3-Stripes on one side Care only hand washClean with a damp cloth when necessary Do not bleach, tumble dry or wringLine dry Do not iron
